questionHtml:
A strand of DNA containing four codons with base sequence ACT GTA CTC TAC mutates, changing the base sequence to ACT ATG CTC TAC. What type of mutation has occurred?


A.  Insertion

B.  Substitution

C.  Deletion

D.  Degeneracy

meta.title: A strand of DNA containing four codons with base sequence ACT GTA CTC TAC mutates, changing the base sequence to ACT ATG CTC TAC. What type of mutation has occurred? A. Insertion B
breadcrumbLabels: D1.3.1. Gene mutations as structural changes to genes at the molecular level
